title: leymus multicaulis
intro: Leymus multicaulis, also known as big blue Lyme grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Leymus multicaulis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
